data.title: News Corporation Unveils $1 Billion Stock Buy-back
data.description:
News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh (AU:NWS) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

News Corporation has announced a buy-back program to repurchase up to $1 billion of its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. This strategic move aims to optimize the company’s capital structure and is contingent upon market conditions and stock prices. No ASX-listed CDIs will be included in this buy-back.

data.title: 37 Capital Completes Second Tranche of Private Placement
data.description:
37 Capital (TSE:JJJ) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

37 Capital Inc. has completed the second tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising $52,000 by issuing 520,000 units at $0.10 per unit. Each unit includes a common share and a warrant to buy an additional share at $0.15 over three years. The proceeds will be used for general working capital.

For further insights into TSE:JJJ stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Piedmont Lithium’s Strategic Stock Adjustments
data.description:
Piedmont Lithium (AU:PLL) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Piedmont Lithium has announced a net decrease of over 10 million CHESS Depositary Interests (CDIs) for November 2024, attributed to net transfers between CDIs and common stock listed on the Nasdaq. Despite this reduction, the total number of securities not issued over CDIs saw an increase, reflecting ongoing strategic adjustments in their stock management.

data.title: Piedmont Lithium Announces Leadership Change and Transition
data.description:
Piedmont Lithium (AU:PLL) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Piedmont Lithium has announced the retirement of Patrick Brindle, its Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective December 31, 2024. Mr. Brindle will assist with the transition of his duties and receive separation payments and benefits, including a lump sum COBRA payment and potential additional compensation if a merger with Sayona Mining is completed. His equity awards will vest fully as part of the separation agreement.

For further insights into AU:PLL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Corazon Mining Expands MacBride Project Amid Retraction
data.description:
Corazon Mining Limited (AU:CZN) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Corazon Mining Limited has retracted a recent announcement regarding its MacBride Base & Precious Metal Project, citing incomplete and unreliable exploration data. Despite this, the company is expanding its project in Manitoba, Canada, increasing its area from 26 km² to 56 km² by staking new mining claims. These claims, pending approval, cover a significant 14 km strike length of a prospective trend.

For further insights into AU:CZN stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
